chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Rules**:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes

**Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order
**Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress

**Examples**:
- Order #12345 for Customer #10001 containing 3 items
- Order #12346 with status "DELIVERED" from last week

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER LINE ITEM
─────────────... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Shipments represent the logistics side of order fulfillment. They track what items were sent, when, and to whom.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED

**Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment
- One order may have multiple partial shipments
- Delivery address mu... [TRUNCATED]

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Concept Mapping**: Category

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Concept Mapping**: OrderLineItem

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts.

**Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PAYMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique payment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being paid | NO ... [TRUNCATED]

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMEN... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: multiple addresses but only one primary per type

triplets.subject: Product
triplets.object: a valid category before being sold

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.predicate: must be confirmed before order ships

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.predicate: is fixed and does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.predicate: is for exactly one Sales Order

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order

triplets.subject: SHIPMENT
triplets.object: Physical delivery of products to customers
